reviews.review_title: Give this game a try- you won’t regret!
reviews.review_description:
I don’t use VR very often, but Sing on the Meta Quest instantly pulled me in. I originally tried it out just to see what the buzz was about, and now I’m hooked! This game has genuinely built my confidence and reminded me how fun it is to just let go and sing.

The music catalog is huge.  I found so many songs I love, and before I knew it, I was completely caught up in the experience. The environments react to your voice, which makes everything feel magical and immersive. Even better, my whole household is obsessed with it now. We’ve already decided that Sing is going to be a staple for our neighborhood game nights.

If you’re even thinking about trying it, do it. It’s fun and it makes you feel good. Highly recommend!!!

You either know if this app is for you or not by simply knowing if you like to sing.
There are an assortment of freesongs to sing to (Currently at launch - Killers/Billy Eilish/The Killers/Linkin Park/The weekend/Greenday and some others)

I presume the song catalogue will get larger as the developer gets hold of more licensing contracts. The free catalogue may rotate on a regular basis Im hoping?

There is an online scoreboard to compare your singing prowess against the world; but the game isn't quite gamified so it doesn't measure you on pitch (unlike some of the flatscreen singing games) which is a good thing or a bad thing depending on what side of the fence you sit.
You basically can just mumble or hum your way to 100% pass


But for anyone that likes to sing the app is an easy recommendation that is set to get better if the team can keep up refreshing the also catalogue with more songs......excuss me as I belt out Lady Gaga "Edge of Glory"

This is the first of its kind, and it’s not a bad effort, plenty of songs to choose from, I can see it’s going to be popular at Christmas, I am terrible at singing so this is awful for everyone to hear me sing.
The children will absolutely love it and watching through the tv will make it so awesome.
Great work and well done to the devs.
Awesome experience. Looking forward to hours of enjoyment with family and friends or just by myself. Love it!

Sing shows good potential for a virtual karaoke experience.  The addition of 360 degree environments, drum pads to beat on, and a 3d art tool offers decent distraction making things more engaging.  There is also quite a large collection of music available through the subscription or individual purchase.  However, there is no separate volume control for the vocals on songs, and you don't hear your own voice play through the speakers.  This means you are just singing along to the normal version of the track.  It is harder to justify paying for music through here when this is the case.  The score tracking seems to only listen for how much you are singing, not how well, so you do not get feedback on your performance.  Additionally I encountered issues with lyrics missing or being incorrect, and when browsing the catalogue the filters do not work properly.

My headset often collected dust when I wasn't using it to workout but using VR has made me realize its possible to have other consistently positive experiences for my health besides just punching the air. The song selection is amazing and the visuals along with the singing and physical activities connects me with music I already love on a deeper level.

developer_response.body:
Hey, Mzomzo!

Thank you for your kind words - Music is inherently therapeutic!  We can FEEL it, you know the goosebumps when you hear something that really resonates - that's the feeling we are after here!  Stick with us, it's going to be a really fun ride!

reviews.review_description: I was pretty disappointed to find this wasn’t a karaoke app. It’s $10-$15 per month to sing along with songs. Not karaoke songs where you’re the singer, but just the normal version of songs.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 

I am Mark, one of the founders of Realize Music. Thank you so much for your feedback. We love karaoke too! Our music licenses are for the original master recordings—and as such, not the karaoke versions. However, your feedback is spot on because we are exploring a way to dial down the lead vocals in songs where the stems of the master recordings are available. 

If this is possible, we'll create a playlist of songs where you can adjust the vocal stems up and down, so if you'd prefer to sing in harmony, you can; if you'd rather be the lead singer, you could do that too! We are exploring this as a future feature and have been talking about it for 6+ months. Your feedback is valuable, and we do appreciate it. Thanks again for trying out Realize Music: Sing—we worked really hard to create a unique experience that would appeal to the most passionate music fans.

reviews.review_description: After a stressful week and a continued weekend of working, I just took a break to try this game out.  I can't believe all of the music available.  I found a song I used to love when I was a little girl and sang it out loud in full voice alone in my living room.  I can't believe how great I feel after.  I am not sure anyone wants to hear me sing (I am super self-conscious singing in public) and the thought of someone walking in the room was a bit daunting at first.  However, after a few seconds I actually didn't care! The environments and transitions really helped me to be very present with the song and I became very comfortable singing along. I think the experience could use a bit more guidance and the words seem a little high from the instruction panels but the feedback and visuals are really beautiful.  This is truly a unique experience and I am excited to see how it evolves.  Great job to all of the devs. Highly recommend this for all ages!

developer_response.body:
The team appreciates you sharing so many details about your experience, and we hope that we will continue providing you with solid updates! 

Thank you for being part of our journey.

reviews.review_description:
Just perfect wholesome fun. The environments are beautiful, the game reacts to you so well.  It’s like singing in the shower, except the shows is in some kind of magical outer space psychedelia realm. 

Highly recommended. There’s nothing quite like it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5-star review. We're happy to hear that you're loving Realize Music: Sing as much as we love developing it.

reviews.review_title: If Spotify Got Knocked Up By Karaoke App
reviews.review_description:
One quick thing about price then I'll get into it: Ppl who are byytching about the price: I'm sure they have to pay licensing fees every month, so stop with the idiotic comments - you can't spend lunch money and have access to all the major artists' catalogs. The ignorance is astounding Wtf ppl.

I was surprised they even had obscure live Dead shows from my favorite period of the GD (early and late 70's).  The catalog is far broader than my taste in music.  Honestly, I could myself just dropping Spotify and using this, it's a streaming engine driving a VR / Karaoke experience.  I mostly stream music on YT and Spotify, but I'm wondering if I can't just use this since they're streaming the original mixes of these songs (not with vocals out).  I see there's a USB-C out - if anyone uses it for streaming let me know and how you're managing your playlists. 

Take a few min to do their intro / how to use training.  Also, you can sort of fly around like your paramotoring, and I had a digital / VR version of the adrenaline rush that hits when you've caught a wave and stand up on your board.  That does make a difference.
 
The founder seems responsive too.  I had a question and he was on it.  They seem like they're in it to deliver, which is cool.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Indeed what we are attempting to do is no small feat! (to bring AS MUCH MUSIC as possible into VR)  There are TONS of rare and deep cuts in the app already - lots of hits too and we are unlocking more every single week.  It is our goal to provide something of great value (and great joy!) to our users so that there is always something new for you to try.  Thank you for joining us on this journey! Stick with us.  We are just at the beginning and it's going to get so much better as we go!  We are open to your feedback and take all suggestions to heart!

reviews.review_description: This app is so fun! It definitely improves your mood and you get energy after one song! It is so creative and I love how you can customize your experience with the paint brush or drums! I can’t wait to see all the other songs that come out!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5-star review. We're happy to hear more about your feedback on our socials (e.g., Discord server) and continue providing you with the best singing experience in VR.

reviews.review_title: Can’t get it to work! - update-works now
reviews.review_description: Updating my previous post and star rating since the developers were able to help me get this to work. Their responsiveness was amazing. However, I am still only giving 3 stars because (as some others have said), I don’t find the library of songs to be robust enough for my particular tastes. But definitely 5 stars with regard to the help I received!

I find that it is missing a lot of top songs from artists. There seem to be a lot of B-sides. Maybe its because they can't get the ok to use the popular songs? It says a million songs but after searching for the better part of the day on every genre, I'd say this number is inflated. Some songs are there but have no lyrics either. For the price of the subscription, its severely lacking. $10/mo is very high for limited availability. Maybe the pricing model should be a one-time charge and any new songs have for an add-on? Its new so I understand that things will be coming, but for now I feel like the novelty has worn-off after a few days.

developer_response.body: Hey there, I am Mark, one of the founders of Realize Music. Thanks for taking the time to submit your feedback. We are adding new songs to the catalog weekly as they become available and unlocked, including the most popular big hits. For any songs that are missing lyrics, we collect this information and submit it to our lyrics partner to have lyrics added/fixed - users can make these issues known through our community discord to speed up this process. With the help of our community in identifying the songs that they'd like to see added, we are able to improve with each update. Thank you again for being part of this journey it's a process and it's going to keep getting better and better.

reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing app. The environments are soothing, and the available songs on launch are fantastic! 
They always say to dance like nobody’s looking…
Well, now you can sing like nobody’s listening, and also play air drums or paddle paint. 
It’s fully immersive and the sound quality ROCKS!

The developers have spared no expense on this, and  I expect they will continue to nurture and support it. 
Well done!

developer_response.body: Wow! We truly appreciate your transparency. You are 100% correct with the last part. Realize Music: Sing means a lot to all of us, and supporting it is our top priority. "Dance like nobody's looking. Sing like nobody's listening". Loving it!

reviews.review_description: What a great new way to experience music! The catalogue is massive. I love the visuals, especially the more psychadelic environments, and painting while I sing was an unexpected but welcome workout. I’m more of a music lover than a singer, but I’m getting better! Highly recommend this app for a sweet, musical escape from reality.

I’m new to the VR world, but I’m loving this app so much. It’s a whole new way of experiencing music that just didn’t exist before. It’s like you can go deeper into the music realm, while actually learning the words to the songs that I’ve loved for so long , all along enjoying beautiful visuals.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to write this! We are psyched to have you along for the ride!

reviews.review_description: I thoroughly love this app. I feel like I am in another world interacting with the music. When ever I am feeling a little sad, this cheers me up. It is very calming for me. My fav.

developer_response.body: It means a lot to us that Sing has been supporting your well-being. That is one of our main intentions when sharing this experience with the rest of the world. As they say, music is the strongest form of magic.

reviews.review_description:
I have to admit, I was a little skeptical at first. I’m not much of a singer & don’t consider myself much of a  gamer. BUT, a dear friend urged me to give it a try, so I did it at her house and then had to get it for myself.  

First off, it’s easy to navigate, there are so many songs to choose from and the visuals are impressive!! 

Once I got in there, I actually opened up my voice significantly and it felt so good!! And it was fun watching the visuals change the more I sang.  

So many of my fav artists are in there, Billie Elish, Chappell Roan, Tom Petty and so many more. 

I wish Coldplay was in there along with some other artists that take me back to my days traveling and free. Those days unlock so many feelings I crave to feel right now! 

I highly recommend this app.  It’s like nothing else I’ve ever tried.

developer_response.body: Thank you! I am Mark - one of the founders of Realize Music - we should have a very exciting announcement for you this week about your request! Watch this space!

reviews.review_description: My absolute favorite app. It really does make me feel better. Was having a really rough day Sunday and said hey let me go try this app. Felt much better and blasted into Monday on eagles wings. Love this so much.

developer_response.body: This is exactly what we love hearing! People being able to embrace music and well-being in their own special way. Thank you so much for your 5-star review.

reviews.review_title: Love the Art and so much music
reviews.review_description: Really like the whole experience! I’m allowed to sing and feel free and at ease after a long work day. Recommend trying

developer_response.body: We're so happy to hear that you are enjoying Realize Music: Sing! Thank you so much for the support.

reviews.review_title: Got lost in my favorite songs
reviews.review_description: I love how I can make the choice to either belt along to my favorite song or just sit back and enjoy the absolutely gorgeous visuals. Painting and drumming are added bonuses!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review!  Painting and drumming are meant to be bonuses!  They are fun and will be improved as we go.  Our favorite part is ERASING what we've painted - it's so.....satisfying!

reviews.review_description: There’s a great selection of songs to choose from. Some genuine surprises.Looking forward to seeing what other tracks are added. The backgrounds are pretty spectacular.

developer_response.body:
Hey, picnic!

Thank you for your review. We are working hard to make more and more tracks available to our community while also improving the overall user experience. Super glad to hear that you found the backgrounds appealing!

reviews.review_description: I tried it and cancelled right away. Not a big choice. Shows popular singers, but the tunes are little known.

reviews.review_title: It’s more fun than I thought it would be
reviews.review_description: I’m not much of a karaoke singer, but somehow doing it in VR is a whole different experience. The graphics are really nice too.

developer_response.body: And this is exactly the beauty that we are trying to share with our community. Music is for everyone. It brings so many health benefits to you. Your example proves that, and we hope that you will continue diving into it as much as we love doing it!

reviews.review_description: Looks fun but you have to have a membership to play
super fun game. Great graphics. And the singing is way more fun than I thought it would be! Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to write a review!  Stick with us - we have so much more in store!

reviews.review_description: What an experience, I sang in space.
Nice little app

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support. This has been—and still is—a wonderful journey for us all, and you are playing a big role in being part of our community.

reviews.review_description: Tried Realize Music Sing after a long, stressful day and was surprised by how quickly it pulled me in. It’s like stepping into your own virtual karaoke lounge, but without the pressure — just a chill space to sing along to songs and unwind. The environments are cool, the song selection is solid, and it’s easy to lose track of time. Definitely planning to make this a regular go-to app. Highly recommend if you’re into music or just want something uplifting in VR.

I got this app thinking that at least the song that is 

 featured in the let's call it commercial is House of the rising Sun but I don't care there's no animal version or any other version of The House of the rising Sun in the end and it's false advertisement I do enjoy the app but it irritates me that literally they're advertising that song in there and it's not even one you can do
